code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let words = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut best = ""
mut best_len = 0
mut first = true
for w in words
  let n = string.len(w)
  if first
    best = w
    best_len = n
    first = false
  else if n > best_len
    best = w
    best_len = n
  end
end

println("longest=#{best}")
